summary: Legacy residue was classified into keep/archive/delete-candidate/active-contract-conflict with explorer cross-checks and focused regression evidence.
key_findings: The active runtime core is mostly clean; the heaviest residue lives in doc_to_book-era artifacts, scratch folders, and stale test assumptions.
tests/test_entrypoint_cleanup.py still expects dead P3 tasks and still catches an unguarded standalone script.
External-root fingerprints remain in runtime_endpoint_report.json and multiple artifacts/doc_to_book payloads.

make .env baseline hermetic for shared tests
